landing.title: Explore a new language
landing.subtitle: We believe language learning should be dynamic and personalized. Discover a new way to learn!

flashcards.title: Custom Flashcards
flashcards.description: Study flashcards with text and audio, using an intelligent spaced repetition algorithm to optimize long-term retention.

vocabulary.title: Contextual vocabulary introduction
vocabulary.description: Vocabulary is introduced through contextual phrases and short readings, allowing you to understand and remember new terms more easily.

routes.title: Adaptive learning routes
routes.description: Learning routes adapt to your learning needs.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Do you have any questions or need help? Our team is here to help you. Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.unavailable: Email contact is not available at the moment.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.sendSuccess: Message sent. We will get back to you soon.
contact.sendError: Could not send the message. Please try again later.
contact.validationFillFields: Please fill in all required fields.
contact.validationEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

config.dailyGoalDescription: Number of consecutive days you want to practice. Shown as progress in the dashboard.

auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.passwordNeedsUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter (required by Cognito)
auth.verificationCodeSent: We sent a verification code to your email.
auth.oauthFailed: Could not sign in with the provider. Please try again.
auth.oauthMissingParams: Authorization code is missing. Try again from the login page.
auth.oauthInvalidSession: Invalid or expired sign-in session. Please try again.
auth.oauthNoEmail: The provider did not return an email address.

dashboard.recommendedEmpty: Practice flashcards to see your weakest words here

gamification.pointsHowTo: 5 points per correct answer. +20 bonus when a word reaches Learned or Known level.
gamification.readingsCompletedHowTo: Complete a reading and submit the quiz in the Reading Center. 15 points per reading.
gamification.medalsHowTo: Earn medals by completing your daily session on consecutive days: 3, 7, 14, 30, 60 or 100 days.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.subtitle: Aggregated metrics for users, learning, and usage.
admin.accessDeniedBody: Your account is not on the server admin allowlist. Set ADMIN_EMAILS or ADMIN_USER_IDS in the backend environment.
admin.forbiddenReload: Forbidden. Check server configuration or sign in again.
admin.kpiLastAccessHint: Distinct users with activity in the last ~24 h (readings, reviews, or streak).
admin.kpiVisitsHint: Visit counter (7 days): readings completed + flashcard reviews + streak rows.
admin.popularPagesHint: 30-day estimate from in-app usage (not browser analytics).

profile.learningLanguagePlaceholder: Select the language you are learning
profile.emailChangeConfirmMessage: You are changing your email address. Enter your current password to confirm.

readingPage.loadingMaterial: Please wait while we load the reading material.
readingPage.clickWordForDetails: Click on a highlighted word to see its details.

modal.completedReview: You have completed your review of 20 words.
modal.completedReviewAlt: You have completed your review of 20 words.
modal.completedReviewPrefix: You have completed your review of

flashcard.empty: No flashcards available for this category.

placement.title: Quick level check
placement.intro: Answer 8 questions by picking the correct meaning. This sets your starting point.
placement.submitError: Could not save your results. Please try again.
placement.pickMeaning: Pick the definition that best matches the word.

flashcards.introBody: Practice vocabulary by category here. Finishing a session in one day counts toward your dashboard streak (based on cards per session in Settings).
flashcards.categoriesBody: Tap a category card to open the review session for that topic.
flashcards.recentBody: Later you can jump back to sets from this area; for now, open a category and complete your session.

reading.introBody: Choose readings by category to practice comprehension and vocabulary in context.
reading.categoriesBody: Pick a category to see available readings and open one to practice.
reading.recentBody: You’ll get quick access to readings you’ve opened here; explore categories to get started.

onboardingTour.introBody: A short first-session walkthrough: a quick look at the dashboard, then we open Settings on screen, then flashcards and reading. On “try it” steps you can tap for real—the tour does not end by itself. Use Next, Back, or skip anytime.
onboardingTour.tour0Body: From here you can track your progress: points, readings, and badges up top; streak, charts, and suggested words further down. As you go, glance at the page behind this card.
onboardingTour.tour1Body: You’re on Settings: theme, language, streak goal, and cards per session. Profile (your personal details) is in the same menu: your account icon at the top right on any page.
onboardingTour.tour2Body: Pick categories to review vocabulary with cards. Finishing a session in one day counts toward your dashboard streak.
onboardingTour.tour3Body: Tap a card to see how a review session opens, or press Next to continue without entering one.
onboardingTour.tour4Body: Later you’ll reopen sets from this carousel. Press Next whenever you’re ready.
onboardingTour.tour5Body: Choose readings by category to practice comprehension and vocabulary in context.
onboardingTour.tour6Body: Tap a category to open the list of readings, or Next to keep the walkthrough going.
onboardingTour.tour7Body: Quick access to readings you’ve opened here. Done closes the guide—then explore freely.
onboardingTour.exploreHint: You can open a category for real—the walkthrough resumes when you return here and tap Next.
onboardingTour.exploringBannerTitle: You’re still in the first-time walkthrough
onboardingTour.exploringBannerBody: You’re on step {current} of {total}. Explore as long as you like; when you want to continue this section of the guide, use the button below.
